annotation_target.structure: Third A theme return consequent — oscillation continues
teaching_goals: patience is the virtue here — the rondo teaches through repetition
each note still matters even in the third hearing
style_tips: no complacency — the A theme must be fresh each time

teaching_notes.note: The patient oscillation — by the third hearing it should feel inevitable.
technique: no changes from previous A theme statements

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 45–48 of Fur Elise (Bagatelle No. 25 in A minor) (continuation of mm. 41–44), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 45–48 and describe the continuation.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 45–48.
Measures 45–48 continue the A theme's third statement — the oscillating figure maintains its patient quality. The phrase develops toward its cadential gesture. Let me loop mm. 45–48.
Für Elise mm. 45–48: A theme third statement continuation. Pairs with mm. 41–44.
